content.query:
CREATE VIEW v_AP_Aging_withPP
--drop view v_AP_Aging_withPP
--select * from v_AP_Aging where Division = ''
AS
/*
SELECT              'Consumer' as Division
,                   CASE WHEN P.ENTITY_ID = '20' THEN 'Westbend' 
                    WHEN P.ENTITY_ID = '30' THEN 'Vinturi' 
                    WHEN P.ENTITY_ID = '40' THEN 'Yonanas' 
                    ELSE 'Edgecraft' END AS Company
,                   'Countertop' as BusinessUnit
,                   'Visual' as ERP
,                   P.SUPPLIER_ID AS Suppplier
,                   S.NAME AS [Supplier Name]
,                   master_name as [Master Name]
,                   category as Category
,                   P.SUPP_INVOICE_ID AS Invoice
,                   P.INVOICE_DATE as InvoiceDate
,                   CASE WHEN T .NET_DAYS IS NULL THEN DATEADD(DAY, 0, P.INVOICE_DATE) 
                    ELSE DATEADD(DAY, T.NET_DAYS, P.INVOICE_DATE) END AS [DueDate]
,                   cast(T.NET_DAYS as varchar(8)) AS Terms
,                   CASE WHEN P.TERMS_RULE_ID IS NULL THEN (P.TOTAL_AMOUNT - P.TOTAL_PAID_AMOUNT)*(-1) 
                    ELSE (P.TOTAL_AMOUNT - P.TOTAL_PAID_AMOUNT) END AS [Oustanding Balance]
FROM                ECM.PAYABLES_PAYABLE AS P
LEFT OUTER JOIN     ECM.PAYABLES_SUPPLIER AS S ON P.SUPPLIER_ID = S.ID 
LEFT OUTER JOIN     ECM.SHARED_TERMS_RULE AS T ON P.TERMS_RULE_ID = T.ID
LEFT JOIN           SCA.TempSupp TS on P.SUPPLIER_ID = TS.supplier
WHERE               P.INVOICE_STATUS NOT IN ('CLOSED', 'VOID') 
AND                 P.INVOICE_DATE >= '2019-12-31'
AND                 P.TOTAL_AMOUNT - P.TOTAL_PAID_AMOUNT <> 0

UNION ALL

SELECT              'International' as Division
,                   'GWT' AS Company
,                   'International' as BusinessUnit
,                   'Syspro G' as ERP
,                   ApInvoice.Supplier
,                   ApSupplier.SupplierName as [Supplier Name]
,                   master_name as [Master Name]
,                   category as Category
,                   ApInvoice.Invoice as Invoice
,                   CONVERT(VARCHAR(11), ApInvoice.InvoiceDate, 110) AS InvoiceDate
,                   CONVERT(VARCHAR(11), ApInvoice.DueDate, 110) AS DueDate
,                   cast(ApSupplier.TermsCode as varchar(8)) as Terms
,                   ApInvoice.MthInvBal1 AS OutstandingBalance
FROM                SCG.ApInvoice 
INNER JOIN          SCG.ApSupplier ON ApInvoice.Supplier = ApSupplier.Supplier
LEFT JOIN           SCA.TempSupp TS on ApInvoice.Supplier = TS.supplier
WHERE               ApInvoice.MthInvBal1 <> 0

UNION ALL

SELECT              'Commercial' as Division
,                   'AFS' AS Company
,                   'Commercial' as BusinessUnit
,                   'Syspro A' as ERP
,                   ApInvoice.Supplier
,                   ApSupplier.SupplierName as [Supplier Name]
,                   master_name as [Master Name]
,                   category as Category
,                   ApInvoice.Invoice as Invoice
,                   CONVERT(VARCHAR(11), ApInvoice.InvoiceDate, 110) AS InvoiceDate
,                   CONVERT(VARCHAR(11), ApInvoice.DueDate, 110) AS DueDate
,                  cast(ApSupplier.TermsCode as varchar(8)) as Terms
,                   ApInvoice.MthInvBal1 AS OutstandingBalance
FROM                SCA.ApInvoice 
INNER JOIN          SCA.ApSupplier ON ApInvoice.Supplier = ApSupplier.Supplier
LEFT JOIN           SCA.TempSupp TS on ApInvoice.Supplier = TS.supplier
WHERE               ApInvoice.MthInvBal1 <> 0

UNION ALL

SELECT              'Consumer' as Division
,                   'Omega' AS Company
,                   'Countertop' as BusinessUnit
,                   'Syspro O' as ERP
,                   ApInvoice.Supplier
,                   ApSupplier.SupplierName as [Supplier Name]
,                   master_name as [Master Name]
,                   category as Category
,                   ApInvoice.Invoice as Invoice
,                   CONVERT(VARCHAR(11), ApInvoice.InvoiceDate, 110) AS InvoiceDate
,                   CONVERT(VARCHAR(11), ApInvoice.DueDate, 110) AS DueDate
,                   cast(ApSupplier.TermsCode as varchar(8)) as Terms
,                   ApInvoice.MthInvBal1 AS OutstandingBalance
FROM                SCO.ApInvoice 
INNER JOIN          SCO.ApSupplier ON ApInvoice.Supplier = ApSupplier.Supplier
LEFT JOIN           SCA.TempSupp TS on ApInvoice.Supplier = TS.supplier

WHERE               ApInvoice.MthInvBal1 <> 0

UNION ALL

SELECT              'Commercial' as Division
,                   'KDI' AS Company
,                   'Commercial' as BusinessUnit
,                   'Syspro K' as ERP
,                   ApInvoice.Supplier
,                   ApSupplier.SupplierName as [Supplier Name]
,                   master_name as [Master Name]
,                   category as Category
,                   ApInvoice.Invoice as Invoice
,                   CONVERT(VARCHAR(11), ApInvoice.InvoiceDate, 110) AS InvoiceDate
,                   CONVERT(VARCHAR(11), ApInvoice.DueDate, 110) AS DueDate
,                   cast(CASE WHEN ApSupplier.TermsCode = 'C' then 0 END as varchar(8)) as Terms
,                   ApInvoice.MthInvBal1 AS OutstandingBalance
FROM                SCK.ApInvoice 
INNER JOIN          SCK.ApSupplier ON ApInvoice.Supplier = ApSupplier.Supplier
LEFT JOIN           SCA.TempSupp TS on ApInvoice.Supplier = TS.supplier
WHERE               ApInvoice.MthInvBal1 <> 0

UNION ALL

SELECT              CASE WHEN ApInvoice.Branch in ('BL', 'BV') then 'Commercial' else 'Consumer' end as Division
,                   CASE WHEN ApInvoice.Branch = 'EX' then 'Excalibur'
                    WHEN ApInvoice.Branch = 'ZE' then 'Zeroll'
                    WHEN ApInvoice.Branch = 'BL' then 'Blakeslee'
                    WHEN ApInvoice.Branch = 'BV' then 'Bevles'
                    else 'Legacy' end as Company
,                   CASE WHEN ApInvoice.Branch in ('BL', 'BV') then 'Commercial' else 'Countertop' end as BusinessUnit
,                   'Syspro L' as ERP
,                   ApInvoice.Supplier
,                   ApSupplier.SupplierName as [Supplier Name]
,                   master_name as [Master Name]
,                   category as Category
,                   ApInvoice.Invoice as Invoice
,                   CONVERT(VARCHAR(11), ApInvoice.InvoiceDate, 110) AS InvoiceDate
,                   CONVERT(VARCHAR(11), ApInvoice.DueDate, 110) AS DueDate
,                   cast(ApSupplier.TermsCode as varchar(8)) as Terms
,                   ApInvoice.MthInvBal1 AS OutstandingBalance
FROM                SCL.ApInvoice 
INNER JOIN          SCL.ApSupplier ON ApInvoice.Supplier = ApSupplier.Supplier
LEFT JOIN           SCA.TempSupp TS on ApInvoice.Supplier = TS.supplier
WHERE               ApInvoice.MthInvBal1 <> 0

UNION ALL

SELECT              'Consumer' as Division
,                   'Avanti' as Company
,                   'Compact' as BusinessUnit
,                   'Apprise' as ERP
,                   sn.[supplier-code] as Supplier
,                   [remit-to-name]   as [Supplier Name]
,                   master_name as [Master Name]
,                   category as Category
,                   [reference-number]   as [Invoice Number]
,                   [invoice-date]   as InvoiceDate    
,                   [due-date]  as DueDate
,                   cast(datediff(day, [due-date], [invoice-date])*-1 as varchar(8)) as Terms
,                   [open-amount] as OutstandingBalance
FROM                [APR].[apinvhdr] ai
join                [APR].suppname sn on ai.[supplier-key] = sn.[supplier-key]
LEFT JOIN           SCA.TempSupp TS on sn.[supplier-code] = TS.supplier
where               [open-amount] <> 0  
and                 [inv-status] <> 'Voided'
and                 ai.[system-id] = 'Avanti'

UNION ALL
*/

SELECT      Division
,           Company
,           BusinessUnit
,           'M3' as ERP
,           Supplier
,           [Supplier Name]
--,           [Master Name]
,           Category
,           Invoice
,           InvoiceDate
,           DueDate
,           Terms
,           [List]
,           [Terms Code]
,           [Days Aged]
,           Balance*-1 as [Outstanding Balance]
,           CASE WHEN [Days Aged] <=0 THEN Balance*-1 ELSE 0 end as [Current]
,           CASE WHEN [Days Aged] BETWEEN 1 and 30 then Balance*-1 else 0 end as [1 - 30 Days]
,           CASE WHEN [Days Aged] BETWEEN 31 and 60 then Balance*-1 else 0 end as [31 - 60 Days]
,           CASE WHEN [Days Aged] BETWEEN 61 and 90 then Balance*-1 else 0 end as [61 - 90 Days]
,           CASE WHEN [Days Aged] BETWEEN 91 and 180 then Balance*-1 else 0 end as [91 - 180 Days]
,           CASE WHEN [Days Aged] > 180 then Balance*-1 else 0 end as [180+ Days]
,           CASE WHEN [Days Aged] <=0 THEN Balance*-1 ELSE 0 - Balance*-1 end as [Past Due]
,           CASE WHEN (CASE WHEN [Days Aged] <=0 THEN Balance*-1 ELSE 0 end) <> 0 THEN 'Current'
            WHEN (CASE WHEN [Days Aged] BETWEEN 1 and 30 then Balance*-1 else 0 end) <> 0 THEN '1-30'
            WHEN (CASE WHEN [Days Aged] BETWEEN 31 and 60 then Balance*-1 else 0 end) <> 0 THEN '31-60'
            WHEN (CASE WHEN [Days Aged] BETWEEN 61 and 90 then Balance*-1 else 0 end) <> 0 THEN '61-90'
            WHEN (CASE WHEN [Days Aged] BETWEEN 91 and 180 then Balance*-1 else 0 end) <> 0 THEN '91-180'
            ELSE '180+' END as [Age Bucket]
,           CASE WHEN [Days Aged] <=0 then 'Not Critical'
            WHEN [Days Aged] BETWEEN 1 and 30 then 'Not Critical'
            ELSE 'Critical' end as [Critical]
FROM
(
SELECT      SUNO, SINO, SUM(CUAM) AS BALANCE
FROM        M3.FPLEDG
WHERE       TRCD IN (40, 50)
GROUP BY    SINO, SUNO
) A 

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT      CASE WHEN SU.CFI3 = 'CNR' then 'Consumer'
            WHEN SU.CFI3 = 'COM' then 'Commercial'
            WHEN SU.CFI3 = 'CMP' then 'Compact'
            WHEN SU.CFI3 = 'INT' then 'International'
            WHEN SU.CFI3 = 'SHS' then 'Shared Services/Corporate'
            else 'TBD' end as Division
,           'M3' AS Company
,           CASE WHEN SU.CFI4 = 'CNT' then 'Countertop'
            WHEN SU.CFI4 = 'COM' then 'Commercial'
            WHEN SU.CFI4 = 'CMP' then 'Compact'
            WHEN SU.CFI4 = 'INT' then 'International'
            WHEN SU.CFI4 = 'SHS' then 'Shared Services/Corporate'
            else 'TBD' end as BusinessUnit
,           FP.SUNO AS Supplier
,           SU.SUNM AS [Supplier Name]
--,           master_name as [Master Name]
,           CASE WHEN SU.SUNM LIKE '%ORIEN%' THEN 'I/C'
            WHEN SU.SUNM LIKE '%QINGDAO OTO%' THEN 'I/C'
            ELSE UPPER(CS.TX40) END as Category
,           FP.SINO as Invoice
,           FP.IVDT as InvoiceDate
,           FP.DUDT as DueDate
,           cast(FP.TEPY as varchar(8)) as Terms
,           CASE WHEN SU.SUNM LIKE '%ORIEN%' THEN 'EXCLUDE'
            WHEN SU.SUNM LIKE '%QINGDAO OTO%' THEN 'EXCLUDE'
            ELSE 'INCLUDE' end AS [List]
,           DATEDIFF(day, FP.IVDT, FP.DUDT) as [Terms Code]
,           DATEDIFF(day, FP.DUDT, getdate()) as [Days Aged]
FROM        M3.FPLEDG FP
JOIN        M3.CIDMAS SU ON FP.SUNO = SU.SUNO
--LEFT JOIN   SCA.TempSupp TS on SU.SUNO = TS.supplier
LEFT JOIN   M3.CIDVEN CV ON SU.SUNO = CV.SUNO
LEFT JOIN   M3.CSYTAB CS ON CV.SUCL = CS.STKY AND CS.STCO = 'SUCL'
WHERE       FP.TRCD = 40
AND         SU.SUNO <> '30274'
) B         on A.SINO = B.Invoice AND A.SUNO = B.Supplier
WHERE       round(Balance*-1,2) <> 0.00 and [Supplier] <> ''
